LockInGui.LockInInput.LockInInput
54
486
Salesforce_Prod_ODBC
SELECT
    o.OpportunityID,
    o.AccountID,
    o.CloseDate,
    o.Amount,
    o.StageName,
    o.ForecastCategory,
    o.OwnerId,
    o.LeadSource,
    o.Probability,
    a.AnnualRevenue,
    a.Industry,
    a.NumberOfEmployees,
    a.BillingCountry
FROM Opportunity o
INNER JOIN Account a ON o.AccountID = a.AccountID
WHERE o.CloseDate >= '2022-01-01'
  AND o.IsDeleted = 0

AlteryxBasePluginsGui.Formula.Formula
774
54
DealTier
V_String
20
IIF: classify deal size
IIF([Amount] >= 100000, "Enterprise",
                IIF([Amount] >= 25000, "Mid-Market",
                  IIF([Amount] >= 5000, "SMB", "Micro")))
IsUrgent
Bool
1
Contains: urgent/priority in Notes
Contains(LowerCase([Notes]), "urgent") OR Contains(LowerCase([Notes]), "priority")
TxnYear
Int32
4
Year from TxnDate_Parsed
DateTimeYear([TxnDate_Parsed])
TxnMonth
Int32
4
Month from TxnDate_Parsed
DateTimeMonth([TxnDate_Parsed])
TxnQuarter
V_String
6
Quarter label
"Q" + ToString(CEIL(DateTimeMonth([TxnDate_Parsed]) / 3.0))
NetAmount
Double
8
Amount after discount
[Amount] * (1 - [Discount])
PaymentGroup
V_String
20
IIF: payment grouping
IIF(Contains([PaymentType], "Card"), "Card",
                IIF(Contains([PaymentType], "Transfer"), "Bank",
                  IIF([PaymentType] == "Cash", "Cash", "Other")))
DaysSinceTxn
Int32
4
Days elapsed since TxnDate
DateTimeDiff(DateTimeNow(), [TxnDate_Parsed], "days")
RecencyBucket
V_String
20
IIF: recency
IIF([DaysSinceTxn] <= 30, "Hot",
                IIF([DaysSinceTxn] <= 90, "Warm",
                  IIF([DaysSinceTxn] <= 365, "Cold", "Inactive")))
0
Formula: IIF, Contains, DateTime, DealTier
IIF+Contains+DateTime: DealTier, IsUrgent, TxnYear/Q, NetAmount, RecencyBucket
